chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1917 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.5488/2023 02.12.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant Mr. Pervaiz Iqbal Kasi, advocate for respondent Pursuant to order dated 21.10.2025, learned counsel for respondent states that it may be just and proper for the impugned judgment to be set aside and the matter be referred to the Classification Committee in consonance with the judgment of the Supreme Court reported as 2025 PTD 260. He seeks that pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the respondent arising here-from. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the reference application may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
